element.name: element
element.prettyName: Element (CSS selector that identify an element)

property.content: This Tour will show you how to **Create a page**!

element.name: element
element.prettyName: Element (CSS selector that identify an element)

element.name: element
element.prettyName: Element (CSS selector that identify an element)

property.content: Every page must have a title! **Name it newpage** for the demo to work pretty please. You have 5 seconds after you click the input to write your text.

element.name: element
element.prettyName: Element (CSS selector that identify an element)

property.content: Select a template for how the page should look.

element.name: element
element.prettyName: Element (CSS selector that identify an element)

element.name: element
element.prettyName: Element (CSS selector that identify an element)

property.content: You can now start editing the page content.
